text.title: AI Call Site Inventory Procedure
text.summary: 4-step procedure to apply the ai-call-site-inventory methodology end-to-end.

step.name: scan-for-sdk-calls
step.action: grep + AST scan for known SDK call patterns (Anthropic, OpenAI, Cohere, etc.).

step.name: extract-metadata-per-call
step.action: Per call: file path, model id, prompt path + SHA, output schema, fallback chain.
step.decision-gate: If prompt path/SHA missing, flag as version-less — feed into r1 violation list.

step.name: audit-gaps-and-classify
step.action: Classify: tracked, version-less, schema-less, fallback-less. Sum totals.

step.name: write-report-and-recommend-fixes
step.action: Compose call-site-inventory.md; recommend fixes per gap class.
